raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need a bash command that counts lines of all php files recursively. Use find . -type f -name '*.php' -print0 | xargs -0 cat | wc -l. Or use find -exec cat {} + | wc -l. So final command: find . -type f -name '*.php' -exec cat {} + | wc -l.
raw_output_payload.reasoning_content: We need a bash command that counts lines of all php files recursively. Use find . -type f -name '*.php' -print0 | xargs -0 cat | wc -l. Or use find -exec cat {} + | wc -l. So final command: find . -type f -name '*.php' -exec cat {} + | wc -l.
